description: Provides access to meditation content, breathing exercises, sleep aids, and mindfulness practice tracking for mental health and wellness.

tools.name: get_meditation_library
tools.description: Browse and filter the meditation library by category, duration, and experience level.

category.description: The meditation category to filter by: 'sleep', 'stress', 'focus', 'anxiety', 'beginner', or 'loving_kindness'.

duration.description: Maximum meditation duration in minutes to filter results.

meditation_id.description: The unique identifier for this meditation session.

title.description: The display title of the meditation.

description.description: A detailed description of the meditation's focus and benefits.

duration_minutes.description: The total length of the meditation in minutes.

category.description: The meditation category such as 'sleep', 'stress', or 'focus'.

instructor.description: The name of the meditation instructor or guide.

audio_url.description: The streaming URL for the meditation audio content.

background_music.description: Whether the meditation includes background music.

meditations.description: List of meditation sessions matching the filter criteria.

tools.name: get_daily_meditation
tools.description: Get a personalized daily meditation recommendation based on user preferences and current mood.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user account.

mood.description: The user's current emotional state: 'stressed', 'tired', 'anxious', 'happy', or 'neutral'.

meditation_id.description: The unique identifier for this meditation session.

title.description: The display title of the recommended meditation.

description.description: A detailed description of the meditation's focus and benefits.

duration.description: The total length of the meditation in minutes.

recommended_for.description: The reason this meditation was recommended based on user context.

theme.description: The thematic focus of today's meditation.

new_content.description: Whether this is newly released content the user hasn't accessed before.

series_info.description: Information about the meditation course or series if this session is part of one.

tools.name: get_sleep_content
tools.description: Browse sleep stories, ambient sounds, music, and sleep meditations to aid rest.

content_type.description: The type of sleep content to retrieve: 'stories', 'sounds', 'music', 'meditations', or 'all'.

narrator.description: Filter by a specific narrator's voice for sleep stories.

content_id.description: The unique identifier for this sleep content.

title.description: The display title of the sleep content.

duration_minutes.description: The total length of the content in minutes.

narrator.description: The name of the narrator or voice artist for this content.

description.description: A detailed description of the sleep content and its calming qualities.

sleep_aids.description: Ambient sound elements included such as 'rain', 'ocean', or 'white_noise'.

rating.description: The average user rating for this content.

play_count.description: The total number of times this content has been played by users.

sleep_content.description: List of sleep content items matching the filter criteria.

tools.name: get_breathing_exercises
tools.description: Get guided breathing exercises designed for specific wellness goals like relaxation or focus.

goal.description: The intended outcome of the breathing exercise: 'relax', 'energize', 'sleep', 'focus', or 'anxiety_relief'.

duration.description: The desired exercise duration in minutes.

exercise_id.description: The unique identifier for this breathing exercise.

name.description: The display name of the breathing exercise.

duration_minutes.description: The total length of the exercise in minutes.

pattern.description: The breathing pattern technique used such as '4-7-8', 'box_breathing', or 'coherent'.

instructions.description: Step-by-step instructions for performing the breathing exercise.

visual_guide.description: Whether a visual breathing guide animation is available.

haptic_feedback.description: Whether vibration pattern support is available to guide breathing rhythm.

exercises.description: List of breathing exercises matching the specified goal and duration.

tools.name: start_meditation_session
tools.description: Begin a tracked meditation session with streaming access and progress monitoring.

meditation_id.description: The unique identifier for this meditation session.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user account.

session_id.description: The unique identifier for this active meditation session.

started_at.description: The timestamp when the meditation session began in ISO 8601 format.

streaming_url.description: The streaming URL for the meditation audio content.

progress_tracking.description: Whether session progress is being tracked for statistics.

allow_background_play.description: Whether audio can continue playing when the app is in the background.

completion_reward.description: The reward or achievement earned upon completing this session.

tools.name: log_meditation_completion
tools.description: Record meditation session completion with progress percentage and optional reflection notes.

session_id.description: The unique identifier for this active meditation session.

completion_percent.description: The percentage of the session completed, ranging from 0 to 100.

notes.description: Optional post-meditation reflection or notes about the experience.

logged.description: Whether the session completion was successfully recorded.

total_sessions.description: The cumulative number of meditation sessions completed by the user.

current_streak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has meditated.

total_minutes.description: The cumulative meditation time in minutes across all sessions.

weekly_goal_progress.description: The percentage progress toward the user's weekly meditation goal.

stats_updated.description: Updated meditation practice statistics after logging this session.

insights.description: Personalized insight or encouragement based on the user's meditation practice patterns.

next_recommendation.description: Suggested next meditation session based on practice history and goals.

tools.name: get_meditation_stats
tools.description: Retrieve meditation practice statistics, streaks, and milestones for a specified time period.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user account.

period.description: The time period for statistics: '7_days', '30_days', '90_days', or 'all_time'.

total_sessions.description: The cumulative number of meditation sessions completed by the user.

total_minutes.description: The cumulative meditation time in minutes across all sessions.

current_streak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has meditated.

longest_streak.description: The maximum number of consecutive days the user has ever meditated.

favorite_category.description: The meditation category the user practices most frequently.

average_session_length.description: The mean duration of meditation sessions in minutes.

milestones_achieved.description: List of practice milestones and achievements earned by the user.

mindfulness_score.description: Calculated mindfulness score from 0 to 100 based on practice consistency and engagement.
